key_insight: MMAT is a multi-agent LLM system that supports the full mathematical research loop by separating control, execution, and augmentation into a harness architecture.
engineering_relevance: The decoupled design offers a practical blueprint for building reliable theorem-proving agents that combine rigorous formal verification with flexible exploratory reasoning.
method: Tripartite Harness Architecture with Control, Execution, and Augmentation planes
Three specialized agents: Knowledge Base Manager, Natural Language Prover, Formal Language Prover
Closed-loop workflow from knowledge management to natural-language reasoning to formal proof certification
evidence_signal: The system was evaluated on open problems across five math areas over a two-month deployment, solving 11 problems.
watch_item: Results come from a relatively small, domain-specific deployment, so generalization and robustness across broader mathematical workloads remain uncertain.
paper_title: MechMath Agent Team: LLM Driven Agents for Mathematical Research
